subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-01 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Though I have been in the West throughout this span of time, yet my face has ever been turned towards the Baha'is of the East
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این مدت ولو در غرب بودم ولی همیشه رویم بسوی احبای شرق بود و تأیید ایشان را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @East and West; communication between East and West, @growth of the Cause
